Hi Daniel,

We reviewed your BK FastLane intake entry and found a few items that still need your attention before the attorney can use the file efficiently.

1. Complete: Spouse Social Security number.

BK FastLane intake team

Hi Nolan,

We reviewed your BK FastLane intake entry and found a few items that still need your attention before the attorney can use the file efficiently.

1. Enter the creditor or collection agency name for the $5,918 debt.
2. Upload Driver's license, replace it if unreadable, or tell the firm why it is unavailable.
3. Complete: Social Security Administration six-month income total.
4. Upload Bank or financial account statements, replace it if unreadable, or tell the firm why it is unavailable.
5. Upload Tax return unavailability explanation, replace it if unreadable, or tell the firm why it is unavailable.

You do not need to calculate legal conclusions. Just enter your best information and upload the requested documents when available.

Return to your intake: https://jimmydanol.github.io/bkfl-crm-lite/intake-demo.html?packageId=bkfl-demo-nolan-pierce-ch7-49&itemId=debt-creditor-fake-debt-nolan-pierce-ch7-49-2

Thank you,
BK FastLane intake team
